name: NVIDIA Corporation
name_th: บริษัท เอ็นวีไอเดีย คอร์ปอเรชั่น

latest_note.title: 10-K Analysis
latest_note.summary: [Financial Performance] NVIDIA has successfully transitioned from a GPU company to a data center-scale AI infrastructure leader, with the Data Center platform now representing the core growth engine.…

top_risks: NVIDIA faces a high-risk profile dominated by technological and competitive pressures in fast-evolving AI and computing markets
Key risks include cybersecurity threats, legal exposures, and supply chain vulnerabilities, though the company mitigates some through heavy R&D investment and market diversification
Overall, NVIDIA's success hinges on maintaining innovation leadership amid intense competition and regulatory uncertainties
one_liner: NVIDIA has successfully transitioned from a GPU company to a data center-scale AI infrastructure leader, with the Data Center platform now representing the core growth engine.
